case_title: AMERICAN HOME ASSURANCE COMPANY VS. COOPER & JACKSON,INC.,DBA OLYMPIA RESTORATION et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY BOSTON, DAVID WILLIAM

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOME ASSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SANCTION ORDERS ISSUED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 EACH TO DAVID W. BOSTON, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 10/30/2006 AND 1/29/2007 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARY ELLEN SCHERER, CSR# 5208. (212)

Boston, Esq., for failure to appear on 10/30/2006 and 1/29/2007 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted.
